rationale: Documentation-only PR. fern/products/cli-generator/cli-generator.yml adds five new page entries (Quickstart, Configuration reference, GraphQL support, Distribution, Troubleshooting) all with `hidden: true` for sidebar invisibility as the body claims. Each of quickstart.mdx, configuration.mdx, graphql.mdx, distribution.mdx, troubleshooting.mdx is added as a new MDX file with `availability: beta` frontmatter consistent with existing CLI Generator pages. A shared snippet fern/snippets/cli-generator-guides-nav.mdx is created for cross-page navigation. The configuration.mdx pages document binaryName (binary target, env var prefix derivation, output subdir), local-file-system output, and the path-resolution gotcha. Pure documentation addition with no executable code, no tests, no manifest pollution. Closed without merge appears editorial (likely reviewer feedback on content/structure) rather than evidence of any cheat pattern in the diff itself.
